sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATETIME);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, stringdate('2023.10.01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = dateadd('month', 2, event_date) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, dateadd('day', 5, event_date) AS new_date FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < dateadd('year', 1, stringdate('2023.01.01'));
